text: @FredMatiangi_1 it is clear u can't run the nation the Abagusii hv become the epitome of state sponsored goons within the united opposition call ua house to order.
label: hate
rationale: 'the Abagusii hv become the epitome of state sponsored goons' attributes collective criminal character to the Abagusii community as a group, not merely to Matiangi as an individual - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: In their prime, Luos were never this primitive. These Gachagua idiots should be shot in the head.
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos were never this primitive' degrades the Luo community collectively, and 'should be shot in the head' is an explicit violence call, even if the immediate target of the shooting is ambiguous.

text: @InteriorKE @gk_ruku @ngaosKE There is a black police goon by the name of Rebecca traffic based at Karuri police station who is harrassing residents she demands hefty bribes anasema wakikuyu wako na pesa .
label: neither
rationale: Post is a complaint reporting an individual officer's alleged conduct and her quoted words about Kikuyu wealth; the author is condemning the harassment, not expressing ethnic contempt - confidence medium because the quoted ethnic generalisation is attributed to the officer, not endorsed by the author.

text: These Residents of Kisumu are Emotional RETARDS, This Reminds Me how they have never Made Raila A President. They will show up To praise Baba but on the Material day of Voting, they don't show up thinking that other Regions will just vote for Baba. Ruto will never and Cannot Bank on Luos for a Consequential vote of Securing his Presidency 2027.Never. And Luo Leaders Knows this..that's why they are bootlicking William Ruto. When they're Dumped around November towards March ndio Watajua Raila is not Around to Call Maandamano.
label: hate
rationale: 'Residents of Kisumu are Emotional RETARDS' and the extended attribution of political irrationality to Luos as a group collectively degrades the community - NCIC ethnic contempt even without a violence call.

text: The primitive tribalist Gachagua
label: offensive
rationale: 'primitive tribalist' is personal abuse aimed at the named individual Gachagua; no transfer of the insult onto his ethnic community.

text: @Maryian96 Matiangi is a fat Ruto, actually more Ruthless to defiance or opposition
label: offensive
rationale: 'fat Ruto' and 'Ruthless' are personal characterisations of two named politicians; no protected-group targeting.

text: @kipmurkomen Every time you rant here you confirm that you are a perfect epitome of incompetence and tribal than any other person among the yamune club. You eat , sleep and dream of Gachagua, an ordinary citizen who does not enjoy state machinery or any monopoly of violence as you do.
label: offensive
rationale: 'incompetence and tribal' directed at the named individual Murkomen; 'yamune' references his political circle, not a collective ethnic attack.

text: @ItsJeffreyJeff We saw this trend before 2007- 08 Post election violence in South Mugirango and Keroka and it was a trigger or was used as an excuse to Kill and displace most Kisii community frm R. Valley and Luo Nyanza. As a community we must tread carefully not to be incited to violence.
label: neither
rationale: Historical warning against incitement and call for community restraint; author is condemning violence, not stirring it up.

text: @abuga_makori @kipmurkomen Murkomen is the main threat to the security of our country 300 shilling blooger like you with no seat and no authority will say anything
label: offensive
rationale: Personal insults at named individuals (Murkomen and the addressee); no ethnic-group targeting.

text: RT @mwabilimwagodi2: The plan by the Murderer is to have Kithure Kindiki run for President to divide Mt. Kenya East and Mt. Kenya West votes.
label: neither
rationale: Electoral strategy analysis referencing Mt Kenya vote blocs; 'Murderer' is a harsh label for a named political figure, not a transfer of contempt onto any community.

text: @MwangiHub But when we call you out for faking your own abduction to gain political sympathy, you start yapping like a dog being castrated,you're just a wamunyoro lapdog
label: offensive
rationale: 'yapping like a dog being castrated' and 'lapdog' are crude personal insults aimed at an individual; 'wamunyoro' names a political patron, not an ethnic community under attack.

text: @KenyanSays Kiburi imemea. Hii ndio shida ya Hawa watu wetu wa RiverLake. 😂😂😂😂 power kidogo, they grow egos
label: hate
rationale: 'Hii ndio shida ya Hawa watu wetu wa RiverLake' attributes arrogance and ego collectively to the RiverLake (Luo) community - NCIC collective negative attribution, mild in tone but still ethnic contempt.

text: @ntvkenya He's a snake. A fence seater, a charlatan. Ndindi Nyoro ubamba mafala. Lol.
label: offensive
rationale: 'snake', 'fence seater', 'charlatan', 'mafala' are personal insults aimed at named politician Ndindi Nyoro; no ethnic-group target.

text: We cannot allow Tribal Bigot Gachagua to lead this nation..at a time when we need to abandon tribalism mkabila Gachagua is busy dividing us..Is he not a national leader and not just a kikuyu leader
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of Gachagua as an individual for tribalist behaviour; the closing question condemns tribal politics and does not attribute any negative characteristic to Kikuyu as a group.

text: @Kenyans Interior nandi,kilifi,Mandela,turkana residents don't even have water,food just imagine that
label: neither
rationale: Factual complaint about resource deprivation across named counties; no contempt or group attack.

text: @vihendaMUFC Salasya na atwoli ndio wanaharibu
label: offensive
rationale: Blaming named individuals (Salasya and Atwoli) for causing harm; no ethnic-group targeting.

text: RT @marto254_: Kama huyu ni Kindiki Sina haraka na maisha 😅
label: neither
rationale: Humorous comment about a named politician; no attack on any group.

text: Rigathi Gachagua; Wewe Kasongo, nilikuonya usiguze Mlima, ukaguza Mlima, uliona ile aibu ulipata jana. Na bado tunakungoja 2027. Umetangaza vita na wakikuyu
label: hate
rationale: 'Umetangaza vita na wakikuyu' frames Gachagua's political actions as a declaration of war against the Kikuyu community collectively, invoking ethnic grievance and an implied threat - the violence framing is transferred onto the community, not confined to the individual.

text: RT @KipsambuT: Murkomen anataka kuwa kingpin wa Rift valley na akiongea kikale hapo Eldoret watu watahitaji translator waelewe 'birya' na 'Airnekeny' ni nini.
label: neither
rationale: Mocking Murkomen as a named individual for his dialect; gentle ridicule of a politician's speech, not a collective attack on the Kalenjin community.

text: Neocolonial goons and the compromised githeri media blaming the Constitution; not those who are subverting it!
label: neither
rationale: Political critique of media and unnamed political actors; no protected-characteristic targeting.

text: @politicalmath You should see all the racists crawl out of their holes when you say it should be full of White people.
label: neither
rationale: Observational comment condemning racists; the author is calling out racism, not expressing it.

text: Yani watu ya Ol Kalou wanapewa gas ya bure na serikali na bado wanasema wantam! Enyewe Kenyans cannot be helped
label: neither
rationale: Exasperated comment about political ingratitude; 'Ol Kalou' is a geographic reference in electoral context, no collective ethnic contempt expressed.

text: @pksalasya We have advised Sifuna to ignore this bangi smoker and concentrate at national level on how to win the presidency.Mambo ya wajinga Kama Haka nywele mbaya Mdomo baggy Kama kinembe atuachie sisi.He overrates himself! Kumbafu sana domo domo baggy fitina tupu!
label: offensive
rationale: 'bangi smoker', 'wajinga', 'nywele mbaya', 'Kumbafu' are crude personal insults directed at a named individual; no ethnic-group attack.

text: #RutoMustGo system ni ya majambazi fr…
label: neither
rationale: 'system ni ya majambazi' is harsh political criticism of Ruto's government; no protected-group targeting.

text: @Wambuib4sky This is News to me, I didn't know MURCONMEN was married to a Kuk. Anyway that's not our issue, our issue as Kenyans is Kasongo Kaongo to go home to Sugoi and make him a WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM WANTAM President!!
label: neither
rationale: 'Kuk' is a slang abbreviation for Kikuyu used in passing as a descriptor with no contempt expressed toward Kikuyu as a group; the rest is mocking political rhetoric aimed at named individuals Murkomen and Ruto ('Kasongo Kaongo') - confidence medium because the ethnic label warrants scrutiny, but no collective negative attribute is attached to Kikuyu here.
